title: notholirion macrophyllum
intro: Notholirion macrophyllum, also known as the large lilyturf or giant dracaena lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Liliaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in China and other parts of Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Notholirion macrophyllum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
